docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF EVANS, VINCENT
REMARK:PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL WITH ZOOM REQUEST

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO DEC-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DECEMBER 9TH HEARING DISMISSED IN ERROR. PLAINTIFF'S ZOOM REQUEST IS EXTENDED TO THE DEC-27TH HEARING. THE COURT FINDS VENUE IS PROPER AND CONTINUES THE MATTER AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF VINCENT EVANS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GETAROUND INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ON FEB-22-2022 - DENIED. THE JUDGMENT STANDS. PLAINTIFF VINCENT EVANS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY BRANDON POWELL, MANAGER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER FOR MOTION TO VACATE IS DENIED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF VINCENT EVANS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GETAROUND INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE COURT FINDS THAT IT HAS NO JURISDICTION IN THIS MATTER. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -BRANDON POWELL TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF GETAROUND FILED BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC
